plan.objective: UI redesign first, then evidence-rich student success and instructor/book recommendation expansion

constraints.constraint: Do not break existing API schemas used by frontend.
Keep build and ingest verification passing.
Respect source trust hierarchy: official > official+community > community > youtube_comment.

research.item: Build trusted source list per provider type (official/community/youtube_comment).
Identify recurring student question patterns from YouTube comment themes.
Map top-tier seasonal curriculum decisions into actionable schedule guidance.
Official instructor pages and curriculum pages.
YouTube question trend themes (Akeoreum channel emphasis).

scope.task: Redesign the main UI with stronger visual identity and mobile stability.
Expand recommendation datasets: instructors, books, student success cases, question signals.
Add season-based guidance for top-tier tracks (Sidaeinjae and Dugak).
Keep recommendation outputs tied to source registry references.

selfValidation.check: critical API path returns expected schema
security controls are enabled for production
